item.dc:creator: Rastifaan

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1455 (fu broadcasting father)
item.description:
Let's get this bread, and, ah yes, Fuck you, media daddy. The memes must flow, for now.
Leaving today to begin my pilgrimage to The Trembling Giant.
My aim is to reach Cedar Breaks National Monument today. I was originally going to go to St. George, but the intrusive thought that I've never been to Cedar Breaks came into my head yesterday, and I couldn't dislodge it.
I will get my dinosaur footprint fix at Tuba City on the way, instead.
Then, when I get back, a new job begins. I hope it goes better than the last new job.
Hummingbirds are gloriously ridiculous.
The Warblers and a few shorebirds are moving already!
I would be on the road now, but i have a therapy telehealth appointment at 9am
Alternatively: me after riding through Imgur trying to find more memes. This, my friends, is why I hoard everything for a while before I post them: one never know when memes will be scarce.
I plan on being here until the bitter end. Someone has to be the one who is playing the violin on the Titanic.
Jakapil. Which i may have spelled wrong.
Chop wood, carry water.
The family name for nighjars like this Common Nighthawk can be translated to "goatsuckers" in English.
Awwwwww yisssss.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "We doing? Glory?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #207
item.description: Trump is testing what it means for a presidency to have no limits. He signs orders that undercut judges. He pressures GMU to apologize for hiring practices, extorts settlements from CBS and NBC, and even treats redecorating the White House as a personal project. What disappears in the process is the idea of shared power. He’s daring us to stay quiet while he sends troops into cities and rewrites the rules himself. Before this new normal is rooted even deeper, remember that LA and Washington already have troops while Baltimore and Chicago are next. We’re not guessing. He keeps saying it, and we keep letting it happen. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-ice-detention 2. https://go.govbrief.today/national-guard-domestic-unrest 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-block-prop-50 4. https://go.govbrief.today/fema-staff-dissent-letter 5. https://go.govbrief.today/flag-burning-ban-trump 6. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-north-south-korea 7. https://go.govbrief.today/maine-medicaid-abortion-cut 8. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-cook-fed-firing 9. https://go.govbrief.today/intel-trump-stake-risk 10. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-cashless-bail-order 11. https://go.govbrief.today/utah-congressional-maps-redrawn 12. https://go.govbrief.today/virginia-giuffre-book-posthumous 13. https://go.govbrief.today/grand-jury-no-felony 14. https://go.govbrief.today/gmu-president-no-apology 15. https://go.govbrief.today/lake-ordered-sit-deposition 16. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-rename-dept-defense 17. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-moore-claim-debunked 18. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-threatens-abc-nbc Yesterday's Most Read - https://go.govbrief.today/habba-prosecution-not-sentenced Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/flocksafety-suspends-feds-program Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: The Long Story - Part 3
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Learning that piggies are friends not toys, with our teacher Miss Lulu. This is my old piggy baby, Luna. She has to go into the vet on thursday so I can get her some arthritis medicine. Vet bills! Best birthday present ever! lol Glad to see all of you who are still here. Hoping that we can finish this story now that notifications are working properly.
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

item.title: Fuck you Utah GOP
item.description: https://www.ksl.com/article/51365467/judge-orders-legislature-to-redraw-utahs-congressional-maps-before-next-years-midterms Utah passed a citizens referendum to give the power to draw maps to an independent commission. Utah legislature decided to rewrite the bill that was passed by the citizens to make the independent commission an advisory-only board, where final decision for maps remains with the legislature. Utah citizens have a long history of being overruled by the supermajority who rule the state. (The state even gave themselves the power to alter citizen referendums after they pass, essentially stealing the power back) But the State Supreme Court in a surprising move told the legislature they overstepped and attempted to (did) take our (citizens) state constitutionally granted right to alter our government as we see fit. The supreme court kicked the case back down to a lower court to decide what should be done after finding the state stole our rights, and today that court told the state they have 30 days to draw a new map or to supply a plan of action that will ensure a new map is written before next years midterms. Utah had a competitive district before these maps. We even had a dem representative from time to time, but the new maps cut Salt Lake County between all 4 of our house districts, which made them all skew heavily republican. It's possible this move could give us another chance at a house seat aside from what is happening in Texas and California. Tl;dr: fuck you Utah gop. P.s. obligatory: fuck you medialabs
item.dc:creator: MothMonsterMan

item.title: They didn’t just lay off Imgur staff, they did it to their other brands.
item.description: Edit: In case no one can see the image (cause the servers are cooked today it seems)…Amino, another popular site that is owned by MediaLabs, had a legacy support team laid off a month ago. Around the same time as Imgurs team. They don’t fucking care. They are burning money and finding the cheap solution to keeping these brand afloat. Outsourcing work, using AI to run things. They just want to funnel ads to users.
item.dc:creator: WeatherWiz

item.title: Well, I've thought long and hard about it, and I finally came to a decision about whether Intergalactic Quality is here to stay or if it's time to move on. I'm sorry but...

item.title: "I have the right to do anything I want to do. I'm the president of the United States." - Dictator Rump
item.description: No, I did not tag this as "political". We are far beyond just simple politics now; we are in serious shit as long as this fucker remains in power. This is now a fight for our freedoms, for democracy, our lives. #not_funny
